sensor_roll_analysis: Do not roll every camera 90°. Use selected rolled cameras to improve vertical body coverage while keeping landscape views for horizontal parallax.
Performer envelope is human-height; selected portrait cameras are useful for head-to-toe coverage.

move_suggestions: No camera move required. Preserve useful overlap; do not remove cameras solely because they overlap.
recommendations: Coverage is continuous around the performer envelope.
2–4 camera overlap is treated as useful for 4DGS, not waste.
No true redundant same-angle sectors detected.
Per-subject resolution is viable for a synthetic preflight pass.
No camera move required. Preserve useful overlap; do not remove cameras solely because they overlap.
Recommended layout: best starting point for one performer in a controlled volume.
